details.name: Test 6 - Regression Validation
details.regression_result: Next version installed successfully on Arm64
details.comparison: Current pinned Disconf release tag 2.6.27 passed the Dockerized Temurin 8 build on Arm64. Regression validation downloaded release tag 2.6.28, installed it into an isolated Maven repository inside the container, and produced disconf-core/target/disconf-core.jar successfully. The GitHub release tag is treated as the authoritative package version because older upstream Maven version fields are inconsistent.
